what_it_does: This file is a ledger attachment record that associates the design-source channel with an external image asset located at image://design-source/presentation-15p/p-14.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp
target uses an image:// URI pointing to design-source/presentation-15p/p-14
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with UTC offset
No body content beyond the frontmatter
standouts: The target URI encodes both the channel (design-source) and a specific page/slide identifier (p-14) within a 15-page presentation
The record is purely metadata with no embedded image or descriptive caption
conventions: References an external asset via a URI rather than embedding it
concerns: attachment_type 'images' is plural but only a single target is listed
No title, caption, alt text, author, or context for the referenced image
The image:// URI cannot be resolved or verified from this file alone
notes: A timestamped ledger stub that links the design-source channel to slide/image p-14 of a 15-page presentation.
questions: What content is shown in image p-14?
Is p-14 a slide number or an arbitrary asset identifier?
Who added this attachment and for what decision or discussion?
purpose_vs_actual: The file's purpose as a channel attachment record matches its content: it stores metadata linking a channel to an external image asset.
intention_signals: To create a durable, timestamped reference that connects a design-source channel to a specific image asset so it can be retrieved or discussed in context later.
contribution: Provides a persistent, timestamped association between the design-source channel and a specific external image asset, supporting later lookup and contextual reconstruction.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata record att-abf2c4e3 linking the design-source channel to the image asset image://design-source/presentation-15p/p-14 with an ISO 8601 timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To log a reference from the design-source channel to a specific presentation image for traceability and retrieval.
